title: Raise remote pay without leaving home
meta_description: Convert local cost of living to a USD remote salary in 10 minutes – a Node 20 script that scrapes FX rates, applies COL index, and outputs a defensible rate range clients accept.
prewritten_tweet:
Most remote devs from lower-cost countries leave $5k–$10k on the table every year.

A 10-line Node script changed that for me.

https://kubaik.github.io/raise-remote-pay-without-leaving-home

#Blockchain #TechCareer #SoftwareEngineering #Freelancing

Hot take: most people skip the measurement step. Agree?
